message.content: ## 작업 목적 Next.js 15 App Router 프로젝트(`D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2`)에서 **Inspection(검수) 기능을 신규 구현**한다. 이 모듈은 아무 파일도 없는 완전 신규 구현이다. Domain 모듈을 참조 패턴으로 사용한다. ## 절대 수정하지 말 것 - `frontend/` 폴더 — 구 React 프로젝트, 건드리지 말 것 - `features/domain/`, `features/word/`, `features/term/`, `features/forbidden/` — 완성된 모듈, 수정 금지 ## 참조 패턴 (필수 읽기) 작업 전 아래 파일들을 읽어 패턴 파악: - `features/domain/types.ts` - `features/domain/schema.ts` - `features/domain/queries.ts` - `features/domain/actions.ts` - `features/domain/components/DomainTable.tsx` - `features/domain/components/DomainSearchForm.tsx` - `features/domain/components/DomainDetailPanel.tsx` - `app/(admin)/domain/page.tsx` - `components/ui/data-table.tsx` — DataTable 인터페이스 - `components/ui/page-header.tsx` — PageHeader 인터페이스 - `components/ui/search-form.tsx` — SearchForm 인터페이스 - `lib/errors.ts` — ActionResult 타입 ## Prisma 스키마 (참고) ```prisma model Inspection { id Int @id @default(autoincrement()) targetType String @map("target_type") -- "WORD" | "TERM" targetId Int @map("target_id") status InspectionStatus @default(PENDING) @map("insp_status") comment String? @map("comment") inspectorId String? @map("inspector_id") createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") } enum InspectionStatus { PENDING APPROVED REJECTED } ``` ## 기술 스택 (준수 필수) - Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript strict - `searchParams`는 `Promise<>` — Server Component에서 `await searchParams` - shadcn/ui (`button`, `input`, `dialog`, `form`, `select`, `badge`, `textarea`) - AG Grid DataTable (`@/components/ui/data-table`) - react-hook-form + zodResolver — 폼 유효성 - toast from `sonner` — 알림 - `date-fns` format — 날짜 포맷 - `revalidatePath` — Server Action 후 - `router.refresh()` — Client 갱신 - 모든 try/catch에서 `console.error` 로깅 ## 구현할 파일 목록 (전부 신규) ### 1. `features/inspection/types.ts` ```typescript export type InspectionItem = { id: number targetType: string targetId: number status: 'PENDING' | 'APPROVED' | 'REJECTED' comment: string | null inspectorId: string | null createdAt: Date updatedAt: Date } export type InspectionListResult = { items: InspectionItem[] total: number } ``` ### 2. `features/inspection/schema.ts` ```typescript import { z } from 'zod' export const inspectionSearchSchema = z.object({ targetType: z.string().optional(), status: z.enum(['PENDING', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED']).optional(), page: z.coerce.number().default(0), size: z.coerce.number().default(20), }) export const inspectionUpdateSchema = z.object({ status: z.enum(['APPROVED', 'REJECTED']), comment: z.string().optional(), }) export type InspectionSearchInput = z.infer export type InspectionUpdateInput = z.infer ``` ### 3. `features/inspection/queries.ts` `'server-only'` import 필수. ```typescript import 'server-only' import { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma' import type { InspectionSearchInput } from './schema' export async function getInspections(params: InspectionSearchInput) { const where = { ...(params.targetType && { targetType: params.targetType }), ...(params.status && { status: params.status }), } const [items, total] = await prisma.$transaction([ prisma.inspection.findMany({ where, select: { id: true, targetType: true, targetId: true, status: true, comment: true, inspectorId: true, createdAt: true, updatedAt: true, }, skip: params.page * params.size, take: params.size, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' }, }), prisma.inspection.count({ where }), ]) return { items, total } } ``` ### 4. `features/inspection/actions.ts` `'use server'` 필수. 모든 작업에 try/catch 적용. ```typescript 'use server' import { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma' import { requireAdmin } from '@/lib/auth' import { revalidatePath } from 'next/cache' import { inspectionUpdateSchema } from './schema' import type { ActionResult } from '@/lib/errors' export async function updateInspection( id: number, input: unknown ): Promise { try { await requireAdmin() const parsed = inspectionUpdateSchema.safeParse(input) if (!parsed.success) { return { success: false, error: '입력값이 올바르지 않습니다', code: 'VALIDATION_ERROR' } } await prisma.inspection.update({ where: { id }, data: { status: parsed.data.status, comment: parsed.data.comment ?? null }, }) revalidatePath('/inspection') return { success: true, data: undefined } } catch (e) { console.error('updateInspection error:', e) return { success: false, error: '검수 상태 변경 중 오류가 발생했습니다', code: 'INTERNAL_ERROR' } } } ``` ### 5. `features/inspection/components/InspectionSearchForm.tsx` `'use client'` 컴포넌트. SearchForm 컴포넌트 사용. 검색 필드: - `targetType`: Select (전체 / WORD / TERM) - `status`: Select (전체 / 대기 / 승인 / 반려) 검색 시 `router.push`로 searchParams 업데이트. ### 6. `features/inspection/components/InspectionTable.tsx` `'use client'` 컴포넌트. DataTable 사용. ```typescript interface InspectionTableProps { items: InspectionItem[] onRowClick: (item: InspectionItem) => void } ``` AG Grid 컬럼 (6개): 1. `id` — "번호", 80px 2. `targetType` — "대상 유형", 100px ("WORD"→"단어", "TERM"→"용어") 3. `targetId` — "대상 ID", 100px 4. `status` — "상태", 100px (Badge: PENDING→"대기"/outline, APPROVED→"승인"/default, REJECTED→"반려"/destructive) 5. `comment` — "검수 의견", flex:1 (null이면 '-') 6. `createdAt` — "등록일", 120px, `format(new Date(value), 'yyyy-MM-dd')` ### 7. `features/inspection/components/InspectionDetailPanel.tsx` `'use client'` 컴포넌트. Dialog 기반 상세+검수 처리 패널. ```typescript interface InspectionDetailPanelProps { inspection: InspectionItem | null open: boolean onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void } ``` Dialog 내용: - 상세 정보 표시 (id, targetType, targetId, status, comment, createdAt) - status가 PENDING인 경우만 "승인" / "반려" 버튼 표시 - "승인" 클릭 → `updateInspection(id, { status: 'APPROVED' })` 호출 - "반려" 클릭 → textarea로 의견 입력 후 `updateInspection(id, { status: 'REJECTED', comment })` 호출 - 성공: toast.success + onOpenChange(false) + router.refresh() - 실패: toast.error 반려 시 의견 입력은 간단한 `

- understand-anything:understand
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

content.text: 참조 파일들을 먼저 읽어 패턴을 파악하겠습니다.

content.content:
1	import { z } from 'zod'
2	
3	export const domainSearchSchema = z.object({
4	  keyword: z.string().optional(),
5	  page: z.coerce.number().default(0),
6	  size: z.coerce.number().default(20),
7	})
8	
9	export const domainSaveSchema = z.object({
10	  code: z.string().min(1).max(20),
11	  name: z.string().min(1).max(100),
12	  description: z.string().optional(),
13	})
14	
15	export type DomainSearchInput = z.infer<typeof domainSearchSchema>
16	export type DomainSaveInput = z.infer<typeof domainSaveSchema>
17

content.text: 나머지 참조 파일들을 병렬로 읽겠습니다.

content.content:
1	import 'server-only'
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma'
3	import type { DomainSearchInput } from './schema'
4	
5	export async function getDomains(params: DomainSearchInput) {
6	  const where = params.keyword
7	    ? {
8	        OR: [
9	          { code: { contains: params.keyword } },
10	          { name: { contains: params.keyword } },
11	        ],
12	      }
13	    : {}
14	
15	  const [items, total] = await prisma.$transaction([
16	    prisma.domain.findMany({
17	      where,
18	      select: { id: true, code: true, name: true, description: true, createdAt: true },
19	      skip: params.page * params.size,
20	      take: params.size,
21	      orderBy: { code: 'asc' },
22	    }),
23	    prisma.domain.count({ where }),
24	  ])
25	
26	  return { items, total }
27	}
28	
29	export async function getDomainById(id: number) {
30	  return prisma.domain.findUnique({ where: { id } })
31	}
32

1	export const ErrorCode = {
2	  UNAUTHORIZED: 'UNAUTHORIZED',
3	  FORBIDDEN: 'FORBIDDEN',
4	  NOT_FOUND: 'NOT_FOUND',
5	  VALIDATION_ERROR: 'VALIDATION_ERROR',
6	  INTERNAL_ERROR: 'INTERNAL_ERROR',
7	} as const
8	
9	export type ActionResult<T = void> =
10	  | { success: true; data: T }
11	  | { success: false; error: string; code: keyof typeof ErrorCode }
12

## 완료 결과

총 9개 파일 신규 생성 완료:

**features/inspection/ (데이터/로직 레이어)**
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\types.ts` — `InspectionItem`, `InspectionListResult` 타입 정의
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\schema.ts` — `inspectionSearchSchema`, `inspectionUpdateSchema` (zod)
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\queries.ts` — `getInspections()`, `'server-only'` import 적용
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\actions.ts` — `updateInspection()`, `'use server'` + try/catch + `revalidatePath('/inspection')`

**features/inspection/components/ (UI 레이어)**
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\components\InspectionSearchForm.tsx` — targetType/status Select 검색, router.push
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\components\InspectionTable.tsx` — AG Grid 6컬럼 (번호/대상유형/대상ID/상태/검수의견/등록일)
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\components\InspectionDetailPanel.tsx` — Dialog 상세 + PENDING일 때만 승인/반려 버튼, 반려 시 Textarea 입력 후 처리
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\inspection\components\InspectionView.tsx` — selected/detailOpen state 관리 클라이언트 컨테이너

**app/(admin)/inspection/**
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\app\(admin)\inspection\page.tsx` — Server Component, `await searchParams`, `getInspections()` 호출

**완료 기준 체크:**
- `'server-only'` — queries.ts 적용
- `'use server'` — actions.ts 적용
- `'use client'` — SearchForm, Table, DetailPanel, View 전체 적용
- `revalidatePath('/inspection')` — updateInspection 성공 후 적용
- `router.refresh()` — DetailPanel 승인/반려 성공 후 적용
- `try/catch + console.error` — actions.ts 전체 적용
- `searchParams: Promise<>` + `await` — page.tsx 적용
- Domain 모듈 패턴(SearchForm/DataTable/Dialog/PageHeader) 동일하게 준수
